reason: Confirmed real bug: calling average([]) raises ZeroDivisionError because len([]) is 0; the snippet is present at the verified anchor location.
comment: Division-by-zero when `nums` is empty: `len(nums)` is 0, raising ZeroDivisionError at runtime. Add an early guard, e.g. `if not nums: return 0` (or raise ValueError, depending on the desired semantics).
